pi_items.source: install_gvsig.sh downloads ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip into the /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries directory.
install_gvsig.sh downloads ne_110m_populated_places.zip into the /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities directory.
Task description and export_result.sh confirm this is the expected output location.
Stated explicitly in the task instructions.
Verified by downloading the exact Natural Earth shapefile URL specified in install_gvsig.sh and counting features using Geopandas.
Verified against the verifier logic and spatial analysis. The true count of cities near shared borders is 53, which is greater than 30.

Verified against the verifier logic and spatial analysis. The true count of cities near shared borders is 53, which is less than 100. (Note: Naive execution buffering all boundaries yields 142 cities, which exceeds this bound).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real-world GIS data from Natural Earth (1:110m). The total number of populated places in the provided dataset was independently confirmed to be exactly 243. Spatial analysis shows that 53 cities lie within 0.5 degrees of a shared international land border, correctly falling within the verifier's expected range of 30-100. However, if an agent literally follows the 'Polygons to lines' instruction and buffers all polygon boundaries (including coastlines), they will intersect with 142 cities and fail the strict threshold in the verifier.
